item.title: Well this is a really empty discussion.
item.content:encoded: I remember reading this all the way back in March, and only found it again because of the "RANDOM SCP" button. This is a good example of telling enough to set an atmosphere and give the proper feeling, but also not telling much so there's some mystery left. +1

item.title: Appels du Vide
item.content:encoded:
There’s only one way down, and it’s the way everyone else has gone before. Inspired by my fear of heights, love of cognitohazards, and the interesting nature of tragic chain reactions.

Thanks to Rounderhouse for the feedback on this one.

The image used in this page was both taken and edited by me, _Utich_, and falls under CC 3.0.

item.title: Junior Staff Post
item.content:encoded:
Currently, you have not sourced the image used in this article, and as such may be a violation of the SCP wiki's license (CC-BY-SA 3.0). You have 24 hours to source the image used. If you have not sourced the image within the allotted time frame, or the source is noncompliant with the SCP wiki's license, then we'll have to take the image down.

EDIT: The image has been sourced, and is cc-compliant. As such, it can remain on this article.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is a really interesting skip. I feel like the picture enhances it even more, because the picture is what set the mood for me instantly.

Upvoted. Good work.
